gitignore_coverage.reason: HARNESS_RULES (from session-gitignore-propagate.sh) includes 'tests/generated/' but .gitignore does not contain this literal rule. The .gitignore line 92 has a comment saying the directory is intentionally tracked, but the comment is not a gitignore rule. Untracked harness paths tests/generated/20260526-052559/ and tests/generated/20260526-053746/ are present in git status as ?? entries.
gitignore_coverage.recommendation: advisory_policy_gap_only — .gitignore was not in changed_files so this is a pre-existing gap. Do not delete tests/generated/ dirs without explicit cleanup approval and contract reconciliation (test-writer contract may version-control these files intentionally).

summary.notes: 0 introduced_in_diff:true findings. 1 pre-existing advisory gitignore gap (introduced_in_diff: false, non-blocking). Both changed files are correctly placed, named, actively modified, and well-referenced.

agents/changelog-analyst.md.diff_summary: Added DO NOT items 13 and 14: item 13 prohibits auto-bulk: prefix when BULK=false; item 14 prohibits creation of /tmp/claude-bulk-commit-sentinel-*.json by any mechanism.

hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh.diff_summary: Layer 1.F rewrite: replaced regex entry gate with two grep -qF substring matches covering glob metachar paths; added M5 bash [[ =~ ]] canonical-form allowlist before Python helper; replaced raw-text grep compound/write detectors with Python shlex.shlex tokenizer (posix=True, punctuation_chars=True) for AC-07/AC-08 correctness.

detect_orphan_agents.note: Codex review found this is a false positive from the detection script. product-owner.md IS referenced by commands/dev.md (line 139, 183, 193, 209) and commands/dev-overnight.md. The script's pattern matching misses plain specialist-list reference forms. This finding is not introduced_in_diff for either changed file and is treated as a detector false positive.

detect_orphan_scripts.note: Pre-existing orphans: scripts/todo/site-navigate.py, scripts/todo/security-check.py, scripts/todo/research-deep.py, scripts/todo/refactor.py, scripts/todo/redev.py, scripts/bulk-commit-nested-run.sh, scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh. None are in --changed-files scope. The changed files (agents/changelog-analyst.md, hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh) are both well-referenced.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex raised 3 findings: (1) product-owner.md orphan is a detector false positive — it IS referenced by commands/dev.md and commands/dev-overnight.md; (2) gitignore_coverage severity should be stated as 'major' (non-blocking only because introduced_in_diff: false, not because it is minor); (3) tests/generated/20260526-* dirs should not imply deletability — they are today's artifacts and the <7 days Safety Rule applies.

findings.issue: product-owner.md flagged as orphan_agent by detect-orphan-agents.sh but IS referenced by commands/dev.md (lines 139, 183, 193, 209) and commands/dev-overnight.md
findings.proposed_fix: orphaned_subagents: [] — treat as detector false positive; product-owner referenced by dev/dev-overnight orchestration
findings.rationale: Confirmed via grep: commands/dev.md line 139 includes 'product-owner' in specialist list, line 183 explicitly names it as one of 4 specialists. The detection script misses plain specialist-list reference forms. Removing from orphaned_subagents.

findings.issue: gitignore_coverage severity should be explicitly 'major' per the inspection rule; calling it only 'advisory' understates the rule classification — it is non-blocking only because introduced_in_diff: false
findings.proposed_fix: severity: 'major', introduced_in_diff: false, blocking: false — major severity acknowledged, non-blocking only because .gitignore not in changed_files
findings.rationale: The inspection rule (Section 18) defines gitignore coverage as severity: major. The default-safe rule makes it non-blocking absent introduced_in_diff: true. Both facts should be stated clearly in the output.

findings.issue: tests/generated/20260526-* untracked dirs should not be implied as candidates for deletion — modified today, <7 days Safety Rule applies, and test-writer contract may version-control these
findings.proposed_fix: safe_to_delete: false, recommendation: advisory_policy_gap_only; do_not_delete without explicit cleanup approval
findings.rationale: Safety Rules prohibit deleting files modified <7 days. These dirs were created today. The gitignore_coverage finding is purely a policy gap note, not a cleanup action item for these directories.

findings.issue: The rest of the draft is correctly scoped for the two changed files: no placement, naming, temp-file, or archive finding should be introduced for agents/changelog-analyst.md or hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh
findings.rationale: Affirms the empty findings for all other categories are correct.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied all 3 PROPOSED_FIX items: (1) removed product-owner.md from orphaned_subagents with false-positive note; (2) stated gitignore_coverage severity as major with non-blocking qualification; (3) added safe_to_delete: false and advisory-only recommendation to gitignore_coverage entry.
